title: Lycoris Recoil
sourceNotes: 13-episode anime (2022). Original anime; manga tie-in by Yasunori Bizen is ongoing (current ch. 40 across 8 volumes as of Jan 2026), retelling the anime at roughly 3 chapters per episode. The TV story wraps around ch. 39, with ch. 40+ moving into new original material beyond the anime's ending. Arc split follows the series' well-documented structural turn at episode 6/7 from episodic slice-of-life to the Majima/DA conspiracy plot.
